title: NVIDIA hits record high as AI demand accelerates
snippet: Shares of NVIDIA surged more than 7% after the company reported blowout earnings driven by data-center GPU demand.

title: Analysts raise NVDA price targets following strong Q2 results
snippet: Multiple investment banks upgraded NVIDIA and raised 12-month price targets above $1,500.

title: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang outlines next-generation GPU roadmap
snippet: Jensen Huang presented the Blackwell Ultra architecture at GTC, reinforcing NVIDIA's lead in AI infrastructure.
